<div class="titleCont hasSideNav"><div class="page-title"><div class="title"><span class="flag pl w32"></span><span class="flag c24 pl "></span> <h1><span class="hideIfMobile">2009 &nbsp; » &nbsp; 66th </span>Tour de Pologne</h1></div><div class="subtitle hide imob block"><h2>2009</h2></div><div class="clear"></div><div class="title-line2 hideIfMobile"><font class="blue">7 Stages</font> &nbsp; » &nbsp; <font class="red">Warsaw &nbsp;›&nbsp; Kraków</font> &nbsp; <font class="red" style="font-weight: normal; ">(1262.1km)</font></div></div><a class="toggleSideMenu" href="">menu</a></div>
<div class="desktop-ad leaderbord general"></div><div class="mob-ad leaderbord general"></div><div class="top-cont"></div><div class="top-cont-mobile top-cont-mobile-race"></div>
<div class="page-content ">
<h2>Startlist</h2>
<div class=""><div class="">
<ul class="simple-list list circle horizontal bluelink fs14">
<li class=""><a href="race/tour-de-pologne/2009/stage-7">Results Stage 7</a></li>
</ul><div class="clear"></div></div>
<a style="float: right; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #aaa; display: block; padding: 3px 7px; margin-bottom: 6px; " class="showDiv" data-id="pdfOptions" href="">more pdf options</a><div class="hide fs14" data-id="pdfOptions" style="float: right; "><span class="iconv3 pdf" style="margin-bottom: -3px; "></span> <a class="fs14" target="_blank" href="pdf/startlist.php?id=4148&amp;option=ucicode">Incl. uci-code</a><span class="iconv3 pdf" style="margin-bottom: -3px; "></span> <a class="fs14" target="_blank" href="pdf/startlist.php?id=4148&amp;option=gc">Incl. GC times</a><span class="iconv3 pdf" style="margin-bottom: -3px; "></span> <a class="fs14" target="_blank" href="pdf/startlist.php?id=4148&amp;option=flags">Incl. flags</a><span class="iconv3 pdf" style="margin-bottom: -3px; "></span> <a class="fs14" target="_blank" href="pdf/startlist.php?id=4148&amp;option=gc,flags">Incl. gc+flags</a><span class="iconv3 pdf" style="margin-bottom: -3px; "></span> <a class="fs14" target="_blank" href="pdf/startlist.php?id=4148&amp;option=ext">Shirts+info</a></div><span class="iconv3 pdf" style="margin-bottom: -3px; "></span> <a class="fs14" target="_blank" href="pdf/startlist.php?id=4148">Startlist</a><select onchange="window.location.href=this.value; " style="font-size: 14px; float: right; width: 120px; margin-right: 20px; padding: 1px; color: #999;"><option value="" selected="">Default</option>
<option value="race.php?id1=tour-de-pologne&amp;id2=2009&amp;p=startlist&amp;view=nodropouts">Without dropout indication</option>
<option value="race.php?id1=tour-de-pologne&amp;id2=2009&amp;p=startlist&amp;view=hide_dropouts">Hide dropouts</option>
</select><div class="right fs11" style="padding: 3px; margin-right: 5px; "><b>162</b> riders</div><div class="clear"></div><ul class="startlist_v4"><li><div class="shirtCont">-</div><div class="ridersCont"><div><a class="team" href="team/saxo-bank-2009">Saxo Bank  (WT)</a><div class="clear"></div></div><ul><li class=" "><span class="bib">1</span><span class="flag dk"></span><a href="rider/andre-steensen">STEENSEN André</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">2</span><span class="flag de"></span><a href="rider/dominic-klemme">KLEMME Dominic</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">3</span><span class="flag us"></span><a href="rider/jason-mccartney">MCCARTNEY Jason</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">4</span><span class="flag ar"></span><a href="rider/juan-jose-haedo">HAEDO Juan José</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">5</span><span class="flag be"></span><a href="rider/jurgen-van-goolen">VAN GOOLEN Jurgen</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">6</span><span class="flag se"></span><a href="rider/marcus-ljungqvist">LJUNGQVIST Marcus</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">7</span><span class="flag au"></span><a href="rider/matthew-goss">GOSS Matthew</a></li><li class=" "><span class="bib">8</span><span class="flag dk"></span><a href="rider/michael-morkov">MØRKØV Michael</a></li></ul><a class="blue fs10"
